title: Our story
lead: It started in 2014 with one charcoal grill, a stubborn idea, and a corner spot in San Pedro Square.
paragraphs: We thought a burger should taste like it was actually cooked over fire — because it was. So we hand-press every patty, sear it over an open flame, and build it on a brioche bun toasted to order. No heat lamps. No freezer shortcuts.

A decade later, not much has changed. Same grill philosophy, same fresh beef, same line out the door on a Friday night. We just added a few more stacks to the board — and a way to order straight from your table.

values.title: Flame-grilled
values.text: Open flame, every patty, every time. It's where the flavor lives.

values.title: Never frozen
values.text: Fresh beef ground daily and produce we'd happily eat raw.

values.title: Made to order
values.text: Nothing sits under a lamp. We build it when you ask for it.
